<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== GREEN SQUARES ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  id={n['id']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
        for cid in n['children']:
            cn = seg['nodes'][cid]
            print(f"    center: color={cn['color']} boundary={cn['boundary']}")

# Check dark gray square id=4 position (target for 6x3 green)
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 20:
        print(f"\nDark gray id=4: boundary={n['boundary']}")
        for cid in n['children']:
            cn = seg['nodes'][cid]
            print(f"  inner: color={cn['color']} boundary={cn['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
